description: E2E concurrency test: 3 clients submit to the single-GPU service; server processes one at a time (FIFO); client3 polls and pulls its artifacts.

client2_bilibili.note: Bilibili. On this host the datacenter IP is 412-blocked by Bilibili risk-control, so this task is expected to end 'failed' with an HTTP 412 error. Provider is correct; works from a residential IP or with --cookies/SESSDATA.

then: client3 GET /v1/tasks/{id} until done, then GET /v1/tasks/{id}/artifact (zip).
